default_binding.ROUTE_A_LANDMARK: the reeds by the old willow tree
default_binding.A1_PRIZE2_ZONE: the calm middle of the pond
default_binding.B2_ZONE: the windy top of the hill

slots.meaning: The child protagonist chasing the balloon.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable child (name or role); capable, curious, not reckless.

slots.meaning: The adult who accompanies the hero throughout the chase.
slots.guidance: A trusted, steady adult (grandparent/guardian); helps but never takes over; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, sunny outdoor place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: One open, cheerful outdoor place with room to roam; wonder over dread; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: The lost, chased object the whole story is about recovering.
slots.guidance: A single cherished, harmless plaything; recognizable at a glance across every scene; never itself a hazard.

slots.meaning: The recurring playful force (wind/current/etc.) that carries the goal around and drives the chase.
slots.guidance: A gentle, whimsical natural force; never violent or destructive, even at its strongest moment.

slots.meaning: The named destination the goal pulls toward down the left-hand path.
slots.guidance: A bright, inviting place; distinguishable at a glance from route B's destination.

slots.meaning: The physical character of the left-hand path.
slots.guidance: An easy, passable slope or trail; no hazards underfoot.

slots.meaning: The friendly animal companions encountered throughout route A.
slots.guidance: Harmless, cheerful creatures that react to the chase like an audience or escort.

slots.meaning: The landmark at the far side of route A where it forks into two tracks.
slots.guidance: A distinctive, safe natural feature; a fair, visible fork point.

slots.meaning: The named destination the goal pulls toward up the right-hand path.
slots.guidance: A bright, inviting place; distinguishable at a glance from route A's destination.

slots.meaning: The physical character of the right-hand path.
slots.guidance: An easy, passable climb; effort but no hazard.

slots.meaning: The sensory cue drawing the hero up route B before the destination is in view.
slots.guidance: A cheerful, distinctive sound or sight; benign.

slots.meaning: The group of children or friendly figures encountered throughout route B.
slots.guidance: Welcoming peers or helpers, never a source of conflict.

slots.meaning: The physical means of crossing to track A1's zone (the stones option at the route-A fork).
slots.guidance: A steady, walkable crossing; no risk of a real fall.

slots.meaning: The landmark where the goal's string gets caught on track A1.
slots.guidance: A safe, climbable or reachable natural feature; wonder, not hazard.

slots.meaning: The tool the companion offers for the quick, direct way to retrieve the goal.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe household or found object a child could use with help.

slots.meaning: The patient, wait-and-see alternative to the tool at track A1's sub-choice.
slots.guidance: A gentle natural force distinct from the tool option; rewards patience, not urgency.

slots.meaning: Where the goal drifts to when the hero waits instead of reaching for it.
slots.guidance: A calm, safe open spot; a pleasant surprise destination, not a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the direct recovery of the goal at track A1's quick sub-path.
slots.guidance: A short, warm success title; the goal is back in hand.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the goal becomes a happy surprise for the route-A creatures.
slots.guidance: A short, delighted completion title; a joyful trade, not a loss.

slots.meaning: The friendly adult helper on track A2 who offers a boat ride.
slots.guidance: A cheerful, capable helper figure; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The landmark in the middle of route A's water where the goal ends up on track A2.
slots.guidance: A splashy, delightful safe landmark; nothing hazardous about approaching it.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the goal is recovered at track A2's landmark.
slots.guidance: A short, splashy success title.

slots.meaning: The vendor/attraction on track B1 where the goal's string gets caught.
slots.guidance: A cheerful, kid-friendly stall or stand; safe to approach.

slots.meaning: The specific feature of B1_ZONE the goal's string catches on.
slots.guidance: A tall, reachable-with-help fixture; nothing sharp or unstable.

slots.meaning: The adult who runs B1_ZONE and helps free the goal.
slots.guidance: A warm, obliging adult figure; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The object the hero can climb on to try reaching the goal herself at B1's sub-choice.
slots.guidance: A small, stable, kid-safe object; sturdy enough to stand on briefly.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the goal is recovered when the hero asks the B1_GUIDE for help.
slots.guidance: A short, delighted success title with a treat-based flourish.

slots.meaning: Ending title: a bittersweet setback where the goal escapes for good, softened by a consolation treat.
slots.guidance: A gentle, comforting title; a wistful goodbye, never despairing or frightening.

slots.meaning: The high, windy landmark at the top of route B where track B2 plays out.
slots.guidance: An open, breezy vantage point; safe underfoot, no edge or drop.

slots.meaning: The child the hero meets at B2_ZONE who offers to help.
slots.guidance: A friendly peer, kind and helpful; a new friend, not a rival.

slots.meaning: The object B2_FRIEND uses to help snag the goal out of the air.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe plaything a child would plausibly bring outdoors.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the goal is recovered with B2_FRIEND's help, celebrated by the route-B creatures.
slots.guidance: A short, warm title naming the new friendship as much as the recovery.
